context: Tests whether autoreview chooses the correct branch/PR target for a clean committed branch instead of running an empty dirty-local review, and whether it preserves the closeout proof loop.

checklist.name: Branch target selected
checklist.description: The plan selects branch review against the PR base, such as `--mode branch --base origin/main`, rather than local/dirty mode

checklist.name: PR base discovery command
checklist.description: The commands include discovering the actual PR base with `gh pr view --json baseRefName --jq .baseRefName` or an equivalent reliable source

checklist.name: Autoreview helper used
checklist.description: The commands run the bundled autoreview helper directly rather than asking another model to perform a generic review

checklist.name: No empty local review
checklist.description: The plan explicitly avoids dirty-local/local mode because the working tree is clean and the committed branch diff is the real target

checklist.name: No push requirement
checklist.description: The plan does not push the branch solely to make autoreview possible

checklist.name: Focused proof loop
checklist.description: The plan says accepted findings require focused tests or proof plus a rerun of autoreview until no accepted/actionable findings remain

checklist.name: Reject advisory weakness
checklist.description: The plan treats review output as advisory and says findings must be verified before fixing

checklist.name: Compact closeout shape
checklist.description: The output is a concise plan with the requested sections and no verbose review transcript
